Description: Epic for managing all vehicle data entry functionality in the Tricentis automobile insurance application
Acceptance Criteria: Vehicle data forms accept valid input, validation works correctly, navigation functions properly

Summary: Complete Automobile Vehicle Data Information Entry
Description: As a customer seeking automobile insurance I want to enter complete vehicle information for my automobile So that I can receive accurate insurance quotes based on my vehicle specifications
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Make dropdown displays all available automobile manufacturers; AC2: Model dropdown becomes enabled and populated with appropriate models when make is selected; AC3: Engine Performance field accepts valid numeric values and displays correctly; AC4: Date of Manufacture field accepts valid dates in MM/DD/YYYY format; AC5: Number of Seats dropdown allows selection and saves correctly; AC6: Fuel Type dropdown allows selection and saves correctly; AC7: All remaining required fields accept valid data without validation errors; AC8: Next button successfully validates form and navigates to Enter Insurant Data tab; AC9: All entered vehicle data is preserved during navigation

Summary: Automobile Make and Model Selection Validation
Description: As a customer entering vehicle information I want to select from available automobile makes and see corresponding model options So that I can specify my exact vehicle for accurate insurance rating
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Make dropdown opens and displays complete list of 15 automobile manufacturers; AC2: Model dropdown becomes enabled only after make selection; AC3: Model options change dynamically based on selected make; AC4: Each make/model combination can be selected and saved properly; AC5: No JavaScript errors occur during make/model selection process; AC6: Selected make/model combination persists when navigating between form sections

Summary: Date Picker Functionality for Vehicle Manufacturing Date
Description: As a customer entering vehicle information I want to use an intuitive date picker for manufacturing date entry So that I can easily and accurately specify when my vehicle was manufactured
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Date field shows MM/DD/YYYY placeholder when focused; AC2: Calendar icon opens date picker widget when clicked; AC3: Date picker displays current month/year by default; AC4: Date picker allows navigation through different months and years; AC5: Dates are selectable from calendar interface; AC6: Selected date populates input field in correct format

Description: Epic for comprehensive form validation and error handling across all application forms
Acceptance Criteria: All forms validate required fields, provide clear error messages, prevent invalid submissions

Description: As a system administrator I want to ensure all required vehicle fields are completed before allowing progression So that incomplete applications don't proceed through the workflow
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Clicking Next without completing required fields displays validation errors; AC2: User remains on current tab when validation fails; AC3: Error messages are clear descriptive and user-friendly; AC4: Validation errors appear only for remaining empty required fields when some fields are completed; AC5: Error messages disappear when fields are properly filled; AC6: Form highlights or indicates which specific fields need attention

Description: As a customer entering vehicle information I want to receive clear feedback when I enter invalid dates So that I can correct my input and proceed with accurate information
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Invalid date formats trigger appropriate validation error messages; AC2: Field visually indicates invalid input; AC3: Future dates beyond reasonable limits are rejected with appropriate error messages; AC4: Validation occurs in real-time or upon field blur; AC5: Valid date entry clears any previous error states; AC6: Error messages specify expected date format

Summary: Numeric Field Validation for Vehicle Data
Description: As a customer entering technical vehicle specifications I want numeric fields to validate appropriate values So that I can only enter realistic and valid technical data for my vehicle
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Engine Performance field rejects non-numeric characters or shows validation error; AC2: Cylinder Capacity field accepts valid numeric values for automobile engines; AC3: Numeric fields reject negative values with appropriate error messages; AC4: Extremely large numeric values are handled appropriately or show validation errors; AC5: Valid numeric input is accepted and displayed correctly; AC6: Field validation provides helpful guidance for acceptable value ranges

Description: Epic for managing customer personal information entry and validation
Acceptance Criteria: Personal information forms capture complete customer data with proper validation and privacy handling

Description: As a customer I want to enter my complete personal information for insurance applications So that I can provide all necessary details for accurate policy generation
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Enter Insurant Data tab loads successfully with all fields visible; AC2: First Name and Last Name fields accept and display valid text input; AC3: Date of Birth field provides functional date picker with age validation; AC4: Gender selection via radio buttons works correctly; AC5: Address fields accept input properly; AC6: Country dropdown contains comprehensive alphabetical list of countries; AC7: Occupation dropdown includes required options; AC8: Hobbies checkboxes allow multiple selections; AC9: Next button validates form and navigates to Enter Product Data tab; AC10: All personal information is preserved during navigation

Description: As a customer from any country I want to select my country from a comprehensive dropdown list So that my address information is properly categorized for insurance purposes
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Country dropdown opens with comprehensive list of countries; AC2: Countries are listed in alphabetical order; AC3: Major countries are included; AC4: Selected country is properly saved and displayed; AC5: Country selection persists when navigating between form sections; AC6: Dropdown supports search/type-ahead functionality if implemented

Description: As a customer I want to upload my picture as part of my insurance application So that I can complete all optional profile information
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Choose File button opens system file selection dialog; AC2: User can browse and select files from system; AC3: Valid image file selection displays filename in input field; AC4: Image uploads are accepted successfully; AC5: Non-image file types trigger appropriate validation if restrictions exist; AC6: Upload progress or confirmation is provided to user

Description: Epic for ensuring high data quality through comprehensive input validation
Acceptance Criteria: All user inputs are validated for format accuracy completeness and business rule compliance

Description: As a system administrator I want to ensure personal information meets data quality standards So that customer records are accurate and applications can be processed correctly
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Empty required fields prevent progression with clear validation errors; AC2: Name fields validate against special characters and numbers with appropriate error messages; AC3: Website field validates email format if applicable; AC4: Validation errors are specific to type of invalid input; AC5: Multiple validation errors can be displayed simultaneously; AC6: Valid input clears validation error states

Summary: Address Validation and Postal Code Verification
Description: As a customer entering address information I want address fields to validate appropriate formats So that my mail and communication reach me correctly
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Postal code validation matches country-specific requirements if implemented; AC2: Address fields handle maximum length limits appropriately; AC3: Long addresses are accepted or provide clear character limit feedback; AC4: Different postal code formats based on selected country are validated correctly; AC5: Address validation provides helpful error messages for format requirements

Description: Epic for configuring insurance products policy details and coverage options
Acceptance Criteria: Insurance product configuration allows customers to select appropriate coverage options and policy details

Description: As a customer configuring my insurance policy I want to select coverage options and policy details So that I can customize my insurance to meet my specific needs
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Enter Product Data tab loads successfully with all configuration fields visible; AC2: Start Date field accepts future dates with proper date picker functionality; AC3: Insurance Sum dropdown provides options ranging from 3000000 to 35000000; AC4: Merit Rating dropdown includes Super Bonus Bonus 1-9 Malus 10-17 options; AC5: Damage Insurance dropdown offers coverage options; AC6: Optional products checkboxes allow multiple selections; AC7: Courtesy Car option provides Yes/No selection that saves properly; AC8: Next button validates form and navigates to Select Price Option tab; AC9: All product configuration data is preserved during navigation

Description: As a customer selecting insurance coverage levels I want to see clear insurance amount options with proper formatting So that I can understand coverage levels and make informed decisions
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Insurance Sum dropdown displays all amount options with proper currency formatting; AC2: Amounts are clearly formatted with appropriate currency notation; AC3: Selection of different amounts affects subsequent form behavior if applicable; AC4: Coverage amounts are presented in logical order; AC5: Selected insurance sum is clearly displayed and saved

Description: Epic for controlling access to pricing information based on prerequisite completion
Acceptance Criteria: Price calculation and display is controlled based on completion of prerequisite information

Description: As a system I want to prevent access to pricing when prerequisite data is missing So that price calculations are only shown when sufficient information is available
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Direct navigation to Select Price Option tab without completing previous steps displays appropriate message; AC2: Message states Please complete the first three steps to see the price table; AC3: No price options are shown when prerequisites are incomplete; AC4: Tab remains accessible but non-functional until prerequisites are met; AC5: User guidance directs them back to complete missing information

Summary: Price Option Access After Completing Prerequisites
Description: As a customer who has completed all prerequisite information I want to see calculated price options for my insurance policy So that I can compare coverage options and make an informed selection
Acceptance Criteria: AC1: Vehicle data completion allows successful progression; AC2: Insurant data completion allows successful progression; AC3: Product data completion enables price calculation; AC4: Price table becomes visible after completing all prerequisite steps; AC5: Multiple insurance pricing options are displayed clearly; AC6: Price options can be selected through user interface; AC7: Price calculations reflect entered data from previous steps; AC8: Selected price option is highlighted/confirmed visually; AC9: Selection enables progression to final quote submission
